title: Perfect Portuguese Bacon Sandwich
description: A winey, cheese-pull, romantic Portuguese dish featuring bacon, double-rise-bread, and paleo-friendly ingredients, served in a bento-box.
instructions: Preheat a panini press to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the thick-cut bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
In a small bowl, whisk together the red wine and olive oil.
Brush the mixture onto the double-rise-bread slices.
Assemble the sandwiches by placing a slice of manchego cheese, a few slices of bacon, and a sprinkle of parsley between two slices of bread.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Place the sandwiches in the panini press and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is toasted.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
